summary: 12 film announcements, 11 TV announcements across 5 trades.

film.title: Grace
film.announcement: Millicent Simmonds co-wrote and will star in the crime thriller, marking Inevitable Studios' first feature.

film.title: Egg Baby
film.announcement: Amazon MGM has picked up the romantic comedy starring Ariana Greenblatt for worldwide release on Prime Video.

film.title: Mickey's Home Alone
film.announcement: Disney announced an animated 2026 Christmas special inspired by the 1990 live-action film Home Alone.

film.title: Thud
film.talent: Sarah Michelle Gellar (Grim Reaper), Rudy Pankow (The Devil), Mali Elfman (director)
film.announcement: Sarah Michelle Gellar and Rudy Pankow have been cast in the supernatural romance directed by Mali Elfman.

film.title: Monsanto Courtroom Drama
film.talent: Jonathan Bailey, Laura Dern, LaKeith Stanfield, Julia McDermott, David Duchovny, Melonie Diaz, Bilal Hasna, Greg Kinnear (cast), John Lee Hancock (director)
film.announcement: Netflix courtroom drama about the landmark 2018 legal case against Monsanto adds six cast members to its ensemble.

film.title: Lady Macbeth
film.announcement: Kari Skogland and Emma Donoghue are developing a feature adaptation of Ava Reid's gothic feminist retelling of Shakespeare's Macbeth.

film.title: Shatter Me
film.announcement: Warner Bros. has acquired the rights to Tahereh Mafi's bestselling dystopian YA series for film adaptation.

film.title: Black Diamond
film.announcement: The folk horror comic book series is being adapted into a feature film with Ernest Dickerson directing.

film.title: Shots! Shots! Shots!
film.announcement: Amazon MGM has picked up the Jason Momoa action comedy, previously in development at Universal Studios.

film.title: Untitled Jan. 6 Friendship Drama
film.talent: Sean Penn (director), Bradley Cooper (star, in talks)
film.announcement: Sean Penn is set to direct Bradley Cooper in an untitled Jan. 6 friendship drama; Warner Bros. is negotiating acquisition.

film.title: Corpus
film.announcement: Yellow Veil Pictures has boarded the NYC nightlife thriller set in the '90s for world sales ahead of Fantasia premiere.

tv.title: The Audicity Season 2
tv.announcement: Miriam Shor has been cast in Season 2 as a shrewd FBI Agent introduced in the Season 1 finale.

tv.title: Heartstopper Forever
tv.announcement: Netflix has released a trailer for the Heartstopper finale feature film dropping July 17, concluding Nick and Charlie's love story.

tv.title: Funny AF with Kevin Hart Season 2
tv.announcement: Netflix has renewed the comedy competition series for a second season following its inaugural winner announcement.

tv.title: The Pinnacle
tv.talent: George Stephanopoulos, Ali Wentworth (producers), Damon Cardasis (writer, executive producer), Jamieson Baker (executive producer)
tv.announcement: Hulu has put in development a high-end New York real estate drama written and executive produced by Cardasis and Baker, with Stephanopoulos and Wentworth as producers.

tv.title: Dirty
tv.talent: Samantha Morton (cast), Phoebe Dynevor (Detective Eva Bennett), Matt Charman (creator)
tv.announcement: Samantha Morton has been cast alongside Phoebe Dynevor in the Amazon crime thriller about a detective returning to Manchester.

tv.title: Count My Lies
tv.talent: François Arnaud (Danny, recurring), Lindsay Lohan (Violet), Isaac Aptaker, Elizabeth Berger (creators)
tv.announcement: François Arnaud has joined the Hulu limited series in a recurring role as Lindsay Lohan's character's friend.

tv.title: Ridiculous
tv.announcement: Louis C.K.'s new comedy special will debut on Netflix on June 30.

tv.title: My Adventures with Superman Spinoff: Green Lantern
tv.announcement: Auliʻi Cravalho will star as Green Lantern in a spinoff of My Adventures with Superman, debuting in Saturday's episode.

tv.title: Universal Global Television (formerly UCP and Universal International Studios merger)
tv.announcement: NBCU is merging Universal Content Productions and Universal International Studios into Universal Global Television under Beatrice Springborn; 22 roles eliminated.
